description: Comprehensive handwritten and digital notes covering the complete GATE Electrical Engineering syllabus with theory, formulas, solved examples, and previous year questions.

resources.title: Engineering Mathematics
resources.subtitle: Handwritten Notes
resources.description: Linear Algebra, Calculus, Differential Equations, Complex Variables, Probability, Numerical Methods and Vector Calculus with GATE PYQs.

resources.title: Circuit Theory
resources.subtitle: Digital PDF
resources.description: Network theorems, transient analysis, AC steady-state, resonance, coupled circuits, two-port networks and Laplace transform applications.

resources.title: Control Systems
resources.subtitle: Class Notes
resources.description: Transfer functions, block diagram reduction, signal flow graphs, stability analysis, Root Locus, Bode plots, Nyquist criterion and State Space.

resources.title: Electrical Machines
resources.subtitle: Handwritten Notes
resources.description: Transformers, DC machines, induction motors, synchronous machines, special machines, equivalent circuits and performance analysis.

resources.title: Power Electronics
resources.subtitle: Class Notes
resources.description: Power semiconductor devices, controlled rectifiers, DC-DC converters, choppers, inverters, AC voltage controllers, cycloconverters and SMPS basics.

resources.title: Power Systems
resources.subtitle: Class Notes
resources.description: Power generation, transmission lines, load flow, faults, protection, stability, economic operation, HVDC and FACTS overview.

resources.title: Analog Electronics
resources.subtitle: Digital Notes
resources.description: Diode circuits, BJTs, MOSFETs, biasing, amplifiers, feedback, oscillators, operational amplifiers and active filters.

resources.title: Digital Electronics
resources.subtitle: Digital Notes
resources.description: Boolean algebra, logic gates, combinational circuits, sequential circuits, flip-flops, counters, registers, memories and ADC/DAC.

resources.title: Electromagnetic Fields
resources.subtitle: Handwritten Notes
resources.description: Electrostatics, magnetostatics, Maxwell's equations, electromagnetic waves, transmission lines, wave propagation and boundary conditions.

resources.title: Signals and Systems
resources.subtitle: Digital PDF
resources.description: Continuous and discrete-time signals, Fourier Series, Fourier Transform, Laplace Transform, Z-Transform, sampling and LTI systems.
